marietta-01.name: Frederick House
marietta-01.summary: A generously furnished three-bedroom house in historic Marietta with full kitchen, living space, and all the essentials for families and longer stays.
marietta-01.description: Frederick House is a spacious three-bedroom furnished home in a walkable Marietta neighborhood. The living room is bright and welcoming, the kitchen is fully outfitted with cookware and utensils, and each bedroom offers comfortable bedding and storage. Located near Marietta Memorial Hospital and a short walk from downtown shops and dining, this is a practical choice for families, travel assignments, and anyone who wants room to spread out during a longer stay. Washer, dryer, internet, and utilities are all included.
unique_amenities: Full kitchen with cookware and utensils
marietta-01.neighborhood: Central Marietta, within walking distance to downtown shops, dining, and the riverfront. Marietta Memorial Hospital is 5 minutes away, and I-77 access is a 10-minute drive.
marietta-01.floor_plan: Two-story house with three bedrooms and one full bath

parkersburg-01.name: Broad Street Cottage
parkersburg-01.summary: A welcoming furnished two-bedroom cottage on Broad Street with a distinctive, comfortable interior close to downtown Parkersburg.
parkersburg-01.description: Broad Street Cottage is a two-bedroom furnished home in central Parkersburg with a warm and distinctive character. The living room features comfortable seating, a large TV, and natural light from a large window — a cozy spot to unwind after work or travel. Both bedrooms are furnished with comfortable beds and storage, and the home includes a full kitchen with appliances and cookware. The interior has a cohesive, lived-in feel with wood paneling and comfortable furnishings throughout. Close to WVU Medicine Camden Clark and downtown dining.
parkersburg-01.neighborhood: Central Parkersburg on Broad Street, close to restaurants, shopping, and medical facilities. A short drive to downtown and I-77.
proximity: 5 min to WVU Medicine Camden Clark
parkersburg-01.floor_plan: Single-level cottage with two bedrooms and one bath

We are currently updating our photography for this property — contact us for a virtual walkthrough or to schedule a visit in person.

parkersburg-02.floor_plan: Single-level house with one bedroom and one bath

parkersburg-03.summary: A comfortable two-bedroom cottage in a quiet south Parkersburg neighborhood. Photos coming soon.

The home is well-suited for travel nurses, professionals, and anyone needing a practical longer stay in the Parkersburg area. parkersburg-04.name: Broad Street House
parkersburg-04.summary: A spacious three-bedroom house on Broad Street with a covered porch, full kitchen, and comfortable interiors close to downtown Parkersburg.
parkersburg-04.description: Broad Street House offers three-bedroom space with the comforts of home in central Parkersburg. The kitchen is compact but fully equipped with wood cabinetry and modern appliances. The home features multiple well-furnished bedrooms including a queen bedroom with an upholstered headboard and tasteful decor, plus a sitting area and a covered porch with seating — a rare find for furnished rentals. Upstairs you will find additional living space with views over the neighborhood. Internet and all utilities are included, making this a straightforward choice for families, groups, or longer assignments.
unique_amenities: Full kitchen with appliances and cookware
parkersburg-04.neighborhood: Central Parkersburg on Broad Street, steps from restaurants and shopping. A short walk to downtown and minutes from WVU Medicine Camden Clark.
proximity: 5 min to WVU Medicine Camden Clark
parkersburg-04.floor_plan: Two-story house with three bedrooms and one bath

ravenswood-01.name: Walnut Cottage
ravenswood-01.summary: A charming one-bedroom cottage in Ravenswood. Photos coming soon.
ravenswood-01.description: Walnut Cottage is a furnished one-bedroom home in quiet Ravenswood with a full kitchen, comfortable living space, and a peaceful setting for relaxed longer stays. We are preparing photography for this property — reach out to schedule a visit or for a virtual tour.
ravenswood-01.neighborhood: Quiet Ravenswood neighborhood close to downtown and the Ohio River.
ravenswood-01.floor_plan: Single-level cottage with one bedroom and one bath

ravenswood-02.summary: A well-appointed two-bedroom house on Virginia Street in Ravenswood. Photos coming soon.
ravenswood-02.description: Virginia Street House provides two-bedroom space for extended furnished stays in Ravenswood. The home includes a full kitchen, living space, and practical amenities for families or shared assignments. Photography is being prepared — contact us for details.
ravenswood-02.neighborhood: Central Ravenswood on Virginia Street, close to amenities and downtown.
ravenswood-02.floor_plan: Two-story house with two bedrooms and one bath

ravenswood-03.name: Henrietta Cottage
ravenswood-03.summary: A thoughtfully furnished two-bedroom cottage with a bright dining area, comfortable bedroom, and classic small-town character.
ravenswood-03.description: Henrietta Cottage is a two-bedroom furnished home in peaceful Ravenswood with a warm, residential feel. The dining room is the centerpiece — featuring green and white striped wallpaper, a wooden table with chairs, and excellent natural light. The bedroom is furnished with quality linens and storage. Multiple bathrooms serve the home, each with its own character. The cottage is well-suited for healthcare travelers at Jackson General Hospital, professionals working in the valley, or anyone wanting a comfortable extended stay in a quiet river town. Full kitchen, laundry, internet, and utilities included.
unique_amenities: Bright dining room with distinctive decor
ravenswood-03.neighborhood: Quiet residential Ravenswood with easy access to downtown and I-77. A short drive to Jackson General Hospital.
ravenswood-03.floor_plan: Single-level cottage with two bedrooms and one bath
